config.neo4j.cypher.topic.s3t: CREATE (v:VertexNode {Scalar:event.tScalar, Degree:toString(event.tDegree)}) MERGE (i:IndexedBy {N:event.iN, RowCounter:event.eTrm, MaxN:event.iM, Dimension:event.dimension}) MERGE (e:Evaluate {Value:toString(toInteger(2^toInteger(event.iN)))}) MERGE (i)-[:IndexedByEvaluate]->(e) MERGE (i)-[:VertexIndexedBy {twoSeq:event.eTrm, divisor:event.pTD}]->(v)
